creator: handy@lambic.spasci.com
text:
WindowMaker upgrade, 0.13.1 --> 0.14.0.  This is a development 
release.  Alphabetize the PLIST.  Brian's picks:  wm >> afterstep.
(Though it still needs a pager before I'm completely sold.)

NEXT:  This needs a WindowMaker-data-xxx.tar.gz tarball, the 
icons and stuff.  Different subdirectory on the MASTER_SITES.  I
want...I YEARN for a way to grab that with this port as well.
(That would solve the libPropList fiasco as well.)
